Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases basic attack speed by 45% for 3s when this move hits.

Move 2.Name: Low Sweep
Move 2.Description: Make a swift low sweep in the designated direction, dealing damage to any enemy it hits.

Upgrade 1.Name: Flame Charge
Upgrade 1.Description:
Charge forward cloaked in flame, dealing damage to any enemy hit.

The next boosted attack after this move ends also decreases the movement speed of enemies hit for a short time.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: The next boosted attack after this move ends decreases the movement speed of the opposing Pokémon hit by 30% for 2s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Feint
Upgrade 2.Description:
Increases movement speed for a short time and become invincible.

After this move is used, basic attacks that hit enemies restore HP (up to 3 times).
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: The next 3 auto attacks after dodging restore HP for 30% of damage dealt. These 3 auto attacks cannot critically hit.

Unite Move.Name: Blazing Bicycle Kick
Unite Move.Description: Create a giant ball of flame and kick it toward the designated location. The ball releases a fierce shock wave that deals damage to enemies in the area of effect. Also increases movement speed by 10% (stacks with the Unite Buffs) for 5s when it hits.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 35% Attack Speed, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Intrepid Sword
Passive Ability.Description:
If the goal scoring button is held down, Zacian charges its sword  with Aeos energy. For a short time, its basic attacks become boosted attacks. In addition, during this time, Zacian can use a boosted version of one of its moves once (this use does not share the same cooldown as the base move). The longer the goal scoring button is held down, the more Aeos energy is charged into the sword, lengthening the duration of the boost effect on basic attacks and moves. This Ability goes on an 8s cooldown after it’s triggered.

Minimum 5 energy is required to charge with a maximum of 10 (except for Unite Move). Duration for buff window is 3s for 5 energy, 6s for 8 energy, 10s for 10 energy. Charging occurs at a rate of 1 energy per 0.1s.

Zacian.Attack:
When basic attacks are performed consecutively within 2s, additional effects are applied depending on the stage of the consecutive attack. If a Move is used, Intrepid Sword is activated, or Intrepid Sword expires, the time to perform the next consecutive attack is extended.

Boosted attacks have an increased area of effect and deal additional damage proportional to the opposing Pokémon’s HP.

Move 1.Name: Slash
Move 1.Description: Slashes target Pokémon and deals a small amount of damage to nearby Pokémon. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, its area of effect is increased, deals increased damage and also slows of Pokémon hit by 60% for 0.5s.

Upgrade 1.Name: Metal Claw
Upgrade 1.Description: Releases a shock wave in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 3s. As the shock wave moves forward, projectiles from non-allied Pokémon it hits are negated. After releasing the shock wave,  Zacian charges in that direction and deals damage to opposing Pokémon, stopping at the first opposing Pokémon hit. If the charge hits an enemy, Zacian's attack speed is increased by 80% for 4s or 6 attacks, whichever comes first. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, the shock wave's size and travel distance are increased and the intensity of the slow is increased to 45% for 3s.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Sacred Sword
Upgrade 2.Description: Has the user slash around itself as if drawing a circle with the tip of its sword, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and slowing them by 20% for 3s. During this slash, Zacian briefly becomes unstoppable and reduces damage taken by 30%. After 1.5s the user then unleashes a slashing attack inside the circle, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and leaving them unable to act for 0.35s. After a flurry attack hits an opposing Pokémon, the user’s Attack is increased by 20% for 3s, and damage dealt by the user’s moves and basic attacks ignores 10% of the opposing Pokémon’s Defense. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, its area of effect is increased, and the time until the slashing attack is unleashed is reduced to 1s.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Reduce the time until the flurry of slashes is unleashed to 1.2s for the base Sacred Sword+ and 0.45s for Boosted Sacred Sword+

Move 2.Name: Quick Attack
Move 2.Description: Zacian charges in the designated direction, stopping at the first Pokémon it hits and dealing damage. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, it also leaves opposing Pokémon unable to act for 1s.

Upgrade 1.Name: Agility
Upgrade 1.Description: Dashes in the designated direction and increases the user’s movement speed by 30% decaying every 1s by 10% down to a minimum of 7.5% for 3s. Dealing or taking any damage extends this duration by 1 second per attack up to 6 seconds and bypasses the movement speed decay. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, the user is granted a shield.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Further increases movement speed gain to 40% on use.

Upgrade 2.Name: Play Rough
Upgrade 2.Description: Leaps in the designated direction stopping at the first Pokémon hit and lands on the opposite side of them. The Pokémon hit is dealt damage and is stunned for 0.25s. Zacian deals damage to nearby Pokémon stunning them as well. If Play Rough connects, Zacian receives 25% reduced damage from the enemies hit for 3s after landing. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, Zacian leaps further and through all Pokémon hit along the leap’s path. Pokémon hit will receive damage and be left stunned for the same amount as the base stun duration.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the stun duration to 0.75s.

Unite Move.Name: Sovereign Sword
Unite Move.Description:
Has the user ready its giant sword, charge the sword with Aeos energy, and then unleashes an Unstoppable slash in front of itself. The user becomes Hindrance Resistant, applying a 10% self slow while the Unite Move button is held down and the user is in its ready stance. The longer the user is in this stance, the more Aeos energy is charged into the sword, and the more damage this move deals. If a set amount of Aeos energy or more is charged into the sword, the Unite Move becomes boosted, and the slash’s area of effect increases. This boosted Unite Move deals increased damage to opposing Pokémon it hits who have been buffed by their own Unite Move.

This move deals 15% decreased damage per additional target hit, capping at 30% less damage from hitting 3 targets.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 30% CDR, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Guts
Passive Ability.Description: Increases Attack when afflicted by a status condition.

Machamp.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits. This boosted attack also decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time.

Move 1.Name: Karate Chop
Move 1.Description: Attack opposing Pokémon with a sharp chop.

Upgrade 1.Name: Close Combat
Upgrade 1.Description:
Unleash a series of punches in the designated direction, dealing increased damage with the last punch. The user can move while using this move and becomes immune to hindrances.

Deals increased damage to enemies that are afflicted by a status condition.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Deals 25% additional damage if the target is affected by a status condition.

Upgrade 2.Name: Cross Chop
Upgrade 2.Description:
Has the user deliver a double chop with forearms crossed while dashing forward. This increases the user's critical-hit rate.

Increases Attack with each basic attack, up to a set max.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Machamp’s auto attacks increases Atk by 3 per target hit, permanently stacking up to 40 times.

Move 2.Name: Bulk Up
Move 2.Description: Become immune to hindrances for a short time. Increases movement speed, basic attack speed, and Attack. The next basic attack also becomes a boosted attack.

Upgrade 1.Name: Dynamic Punch
Upgrade 1.Description:
Jump to the designated location, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and leaving them unable to act when it hits. After using this move, the user becomes immune to hindrances, their movement speed and basic attack speed is increased. The next basic attack also becomes a boosted attack.

Increased Attack and movement speed.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Further increases movement speed by 30%, Attack bonus by 5%, and slow by 20%.

Upgrade 2.Name: Submission
Upgrade 2.Description:
Increases movement speed and become immune to hindrances. When the next basic attack hits, the attack deals increased damage and slams the enemy onto the ground, leaving it unable to act. Once this move ends, the user's critical-hit rate and basic attack speed are increased for a short time.

Increased critical-hit rate and basic attack speed.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Further increases Critical-Hit Rate by 5% and Attack Speed by 10%.

Unite Move.Name: Barrage Blow
Unite Move.Description: Increases Machamp's movement speed by 5%, Attack by 30%, Defense by 200, and Sp. Defense by 200 for 10s. If used again, unleash a combo attack, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and shoving them. The final blow deals double the damage of the previous hits.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 35% Attack Speed, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Long Reach
Passive Ability.Description: Deals increased damage to distant enemies.

Decidueye.Attack: Increases the speed of basic attacks by 3% for a short time after one hits. This effect can stack up to 4 times, and with every third activation of this effect, basic attacks become boosted attacks for a short time. These boosted attacks fire more quills, but the damage dealt by each quill is decreased.

Move 1.Name: Leafage
Move 1.Description: Pelts leaves in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. For a short time after using this move, Decidueye’s Attack and basic attack speed are increased.

Upgrade 1.Name: Razor Leaf
Upgrade 1.Description:
Summons whirling razor leaves. For a short time after using this move, Decidueye’s Attack and basic attack speed are increased, and basic attacks can target multiple enemies for a short time.

Increases the basic attack damage the higher the enemies remaining HP is.

Upgrade 2.Name: Spirit Shackle
Upgrade 2.Description:
Charges power before firing quills in the designated direction. Damage dealt increases the longer power is charged, but movement speed is decreased while charging. If this move hits after power is charged to the maximum, it can stitch enemies to the ground. The affected Pokémon receives damage upon moving a set distance from that location, and their movement speed is decreased for a short time.

Deals increased damage to enemies with low remaining HP.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Deals 15% increased damage to enemies with less than 50% remaining HP.

Move 2.Name: Astonish
Move 2.Description: Deals damage to enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

Upgrade 1.Name: Leaf Storm
Upgrade 1.Description:
Creates a tempest of sharp leaves, dealing damage to enemies it hits and decreases their movement speed for a short time. At point-blank range, it also shoves enemies hit.

Increases the length of time that the movement speed of enemies is decreased.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Movement speed decrease now lasts 3.5s but still decaying up to four times at 10% per 0.5s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Shadow Sneak
Upgrade 2.Description:
Creates a shadow that takes hold of one enemy in the area of effect, dealing damage and decreasing their movement speed and Defense for a short time. Also increases Decidueye’s movement speed for a short time.

Further decreases Defense.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Defense reduction of enemies is increased to 80%.

Unite Move.Name: Nock Nock
Unite Move.Description: Fires quills in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies. The move ends by unleashing a particularly large quill that deals damage to all enemies it hits. This move deals increased damage if the enemies remaining HP is low. While using this move, Decidueye becomes immune to hindrances but is unable to move.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Max HP Shield granted at the start of the Move, 30% Movement Speed granted at the end of the turret

Passive Ability.Name: Natural Cure
Passive Ability.Description: Removes all status condition from the Pokémon. This ability goes on cooldown after it's triggered.

Blissey.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack after a set amount of time passes, dealing increased damage.

Move 1.Name: Pound
Move 1.Description: Has the user attack by pounding in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time when it hits.

Upgrade 1.Name: Egg Bomb
Upgrade 1.Description:
Hurls an egg at the designated location. The egg then explodes, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and throwing them.

Also decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time when they are thrown by this move.

If the user learns both Soft-Boiled and Egg Bomb, the uses kept in reserve for Egg Bomb is added to Soft-Boiled's reserve pool; this reserve pool is shared between both moves. The base cooldown for both moves becomes 5s. The cooldown between using the same move remains at 2s.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Decreases the movement speed of opposing Pokémon hit by 40% for 2s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Helping Hand
Upgrade 2.Description:
For a short time, greatly increases the user's and nearby allies movement speed and basic attack speed. While this move's effects last, all of the user's basic attacks become boosted attacks.

Increases the damage of basic attacks while this move's effects last.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the auto attack damage of all teammates buffed by this move by 15% for 4s.

Move 2.Name: Heal Pulse
Move 2.Description: Continually restores the user's and designated ally HP for a short time.

Upgrade 1.Name: Soft-Boiled
Upgrade 1.Description:
Throws an egg to an ally, restoring its HP as well as the user's HP. A maximum of 3 uses can be kept in reserve for this move and cannot be used more than once every 2s.

Increases the maximum number of uses that can be kept in reserve.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Gains 1 additional use kept in reserve.

Upgrade 2.Name: Safeguard
Upgrade 2.Description:
Blissey grants both the targeted ally and themself a shield, purging hindrances and making both immune to hindrances as long as the shield lasts.

Shield value increased.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Strengthens the value of the shield effect.

Unite Move.Name: Bliss Assistance
Unite Move.Description: Has the user dash to the designated ally to give it an egg, granting that ally a shield and increasing its Attack and Sp. Attack for a short time. The user also intercepts a portion of the damage received by that ally for a short time. While dashing, the user throws nearby enemies and those it comes in contact with.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 30% CDR, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Blaze
Passive Ability.Description: While at half HP or less, critical-hit rate is increased.

Charizard.Attack:
Breathes fire at opposing Pokémon, dealing damage 4 times per basic attack. Charizard may move while attacking but is slowed by 5% while breathing fire. Charizard deals additional damage to opposing Pokémon that have been burned by the user's moves. This additional damage cannot land critical hits; additional damage benefits from regular lifesteal. Basic attacks gain increased range upon evolving into Charmeleon and into Charizard.

Against wild Pokémon: total damage is capped at 250 per hit. CHARIZARD'S BASIC ATTACKS ARE A SET ANIMATION LENGTH. ATTACK SPEED HAS NO EFFECT ON THIS POKÉMON. DO NOT USE RAPID FIRE SCARF ON CHARIZARD.

Move 1.Name: Flame Burst
Move 1.Description:
Attack with a bursting flame. When this move hits, it leaves enemies burned and increases the user's movement speed for a short time.

The Attack of opposing Pokémon burned by this move is decreased by 5%.

Upgrade 1.Name: Flamethrower
Upgrade 1.Description:
Attack with an intense blast of fire. When this move hits, it leaves enemies burned and increases the user's movement speed for a short time.

Increased damage and the damage caused by burning.

The Attack of opposing Pokémon burned by this move is decreased by 5%.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the damage of this move and its burns.

Upgrade 2.Name: Fire Punch
Upgrade 2.Description:
Punch with a fiery fist, dealing damage and shoving enemies when it hits. Also leaves the enemies it shoves burned.

Reduced cooldown every time a basic attack hits.

The Attack of the target burned by this move is decreased by 5%.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Reduces this move's cooldown by 0.4s per target hit every time the user's basic attack hits an opposing Pokémon. (1.6s total for an entire basic attack animation on a single target).

Move 2.Name: Fire Spin
Move 2.Description: Encircles enemies in the area of effect in a vortex of fire. After this move hits, it deals damage over time and decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time.

Upgrade 1.Name: Fire Blast
Upgrade 1.Description:
Blasts intense, all-consuming fire, dealing damage over time to enemies while the flames continue to burn on the ground and decreasing the movement speed of enemies for a short time.

Increased damage.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the damage of this move and the damage over time.

Upgrade 2.Name: Flare Blitz
Upgrade 2.Description:
Charge forward cloaked in fire, granting the user a shield and throwing enemies hit.

Decreases movement speed of enemies for a short time when they are thrown.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Decreases the movement speed of the target by 40% for 3s when this move hits.

Unite Move.Name: Seismic Slam
Unite Move.Description:
Fly up into the air, allowing the user to move freely over obstacles. While this move is being used, basic attacks deal increased damage and leave enemies burned. In addition, when dealing damage to an enemy, recover HP. Using this move again on an enemy will grab it and slam it onto the ground.

The Attack of opposing Pokémon burned by Unite Move basic attacks is decreased by 5%.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 50% Movement Speed, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Run Away
Passive Ability.Description: Movement speed is increased when enemies are nearby. While the Pokémon is moving, their sprint gauge charges. While the sprint gauge is full, movement speed is increased. If the Pokémon's movement speed decreases below a set speed, the sprint gauge will rapidly deplete. When this Pokémon scores a goal, the amount of Aeos energy deposited is evenly divided into equal portions for each head the Pokémon has.

Dodrio.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing consecutive blows with each of the user's heads. When the sprint gauage is full, basic attacks will cause the Pokémon to charge in the direction they're facing and consume all of the sprint gauge. If this charging attack hits an enemy, all of the user's move cooldowns are reduced.

Move 1.Name: Peck
Move 1.Description: Move forward while jabbing with beaks. When the sprint gauge is full, instead charge forward while jabbing with beaks. Using this move fully consumes the sprint gauge.

Upgrade 1.Name: Tri Attack
Upgrade 1.Description:
Dodrio attacks with their beaks in a cone in front of themself, dealing damage to enemies and applying one of the following random effects to enemies hit: decrease Attack and deal damage-over-time for a set amount of time, deacrease auto attack speed, or decrease movement speed. When the sprint gauge is full, Dodrio instead shoots out 3 projectiles in a designated direction. If a projectile hits an enemy, the project deals damage and applies one of the aforementioned effects based on its color. After this move is used, Dodrio's next auto attack deals additional damage and restores HP. Holds 2 uses in reserve and cannot be used more than once every 1s.

When the sprint gauge is full, this move's cooldown is reduced.

Burn: 8% Attack decrease for 2s, 12% Attack decrease if Sprint empowered. Paralyze: 8% Attack Speed decrease and 10% Movement speeed decrease for 2s, 12% Attack Speed decrease and 15% Movement speed decrease if Sprint empowered. Freeze: 20% Movement speed decrease for 2s, 40% if Sprint empowered.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: The next auto attack gains additional healing by 3% of max HP. When using full sprint gauge attack the charge time for this move is additionally reduced by 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Drill Peck
Upgrade 2.Description:
Dodrio moves forward while striking with their sharp beaks multiple times, dealing damage to enemies hit. When the sprint gauge is full, Dodrio instead dashes forward while striking with their sharp beaks multiple times, dealing damage to enemies hit and shoving them. Using this move fully consumes the sprint gauge.

Reduces this move's cooldown. Also, when this move hits enemies, restore a portion of Dodrio's HP based on the amount of damage dealt.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Reduces base cd by 2s and restores a portion of Dodrio's HP equal to 30% of damage dealt by the flat damage (percent damage excluded).

Move 2.Name: Quick Attack
Move 2.Description: Dash forward, increasing the user's movement speed for a short time and deal damage to enemies hit. This move's cooldown is reduced if it hits an enemy.

Upgrade 1.Name: Agility
Upgrade 1.Description:
Become immune to hindrances for a short time and fully charge the sprint gauge. Afterward, movement speed is increased for a short time, and the sprint gauge charges faster.

After this move is used, the sprint gauge becomes fully charged.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Fully charges the sprint gauge on use.

Upgrade 2.Name: Jump Kick
Upgrade 2.Description:
Dodrio leaps forward while kicking. If this move makes contact with an enemy or obstacle, Dodrio leaps over it and stomps the ground when landing, dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time and the sprint gauge charges. If this move makes contact with an enemy, this move's cooldown is reduced.

When stomping the ground after leaping, enemies in the area are also left unable to act.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Enemies in the area of the landing are also stunned for 0.6s.

Unite Move.Name: Triple Trample
Unite Move.Description: Dodrio runs to a designated location. While running, Dodrio is immune to hindrances. If Dodrio makes contact with an enemy while running, they are dealt damage and thrown into the air. When Dodrio arrives at the designated location, Dodrio gains increased Attack for a short time, is granted a shield, and the sprint gauge charges faster for a short time.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 80% Movement Speed, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Iron Fist
Passive Ability.Description:
After this Pokémon hits with a move, the next auto attack will be enhanced, dealing increased damage and restoring the user's HP.

Fighter Mode: After this Pokémon hits with a move, the next auto attack will be enhanced. The user lunges towards the target Pokémon, dealing increased damage and increasing the user's attack speed by 30% for 8 seconds. This effect can stack up to 2 times and the duration refreshes when gaining another stack.

Pawmot.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, lunging at an opposing Pokémon and dealing increased damage.

Move 1.Name: Nuzzle
Move 1.Description: The user nuzzles their electrified cheeks against the designated opposing Pokémon, dealing damage and leaving them paralyzed. The movement speed of opposing Pokémon paralyzed by this move is decreased by 30% for 2s and their basic attack speed is decreased by 10% for 2s.

Upgrade 1.Name: Thunder Punch
Upgrade 1.Description:
Unleash an electrified punch in the designated direction, dealing damage, slowing opposing Pokémon hit by 40% and reducing their attack speed by 10% for 2s.

Fighter Mode: This move has a shorter range and no longer applies a slowing effect, but instead deals increased damage.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the damage dealt by this move.

Upgrade 2.Name: Supercell Slam
Upgrade 2.Description:
The user charges up receiving 30% less damage and becomes unstoppable, then dives toward the designated area after releasing, gaining a shield for 3.5s, dealing damage and slowing opposing Pokémon hit by 30% for 2s. If this move misses, the user takes 3% of their remaining HP as damage instead. When this move hits, the move can be used again; when used a second time, the user unleashes a punch in front of themself, dealing damage and shoving opposing Pokémon hit.

Fighter Mode: The first stage of this move no longer applies a slowing effect and the area of effect is decreased, but this move deals increased damage and no longer has a charge time.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Strengthens the slowing effect to 40% for 2s.

Move 2.Name: Scratch
Move 2.Description: The user attacks a designated opposing Pokémon with sharp claws, dealing damage.

Upgrade 1.Name: Volt Switch
Upgrade 1.Description:
The user cloaks themself in electricity and dashes at an opposing Pokémon, dealing damage and moving behind them. For a short time after using this move, this move can be used once more.

Fighter Mode: This move cannot be used more than once before going on cooldown, but the user's movement speed is increased by 40% for 3s instead.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Reduce this move's cooldown by 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Mach Punch
Upgrade 2.Description:
Dash at blinding speed towards the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon, shoving them, and leaving them unable to act for 0.6s. This move's cooldown is reduced by 0.5s every time a basic attack hits.

Fighter Mode: This move no longer shoves or leaves opposing Pokémon unable to act, but the number of attacks for this move is increased to 3 hits.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the length of time opposing Pokémon are left unable to act to 1s.

Unite Move.Name: Zip Zap Full-Charge Spark
Unite Move.Description:
Charge toward the designated Pokémon from the opposing team, dealing damage to the target and nearby opposing Pokémon. After using this move, the user enters Fighter Mode for 8s and resets the cooldown of all other moves. The Unite Move gauge will only charge when the user's basic attacks and moves hit opposing Pokémon. Basic Attacks against Pokémon from the opposing team increase Unite Move gauge by 4% and moves increase the gauge by 8%. Basic Attacks against wild Pokémon increase Unite Move gauge by 1% and moves increase the gauge by 2%.

Fighter Mode: Basic attacks and move effects change, and the Unite Move gauge does not charge. Gain 30% omni-vamp while Fighter Mode is active.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 50% Movement Speed, 35% Attack Speed, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Sniper
Passive Ability.Description:
When this Pokémon stays near a wall for 1s it becomes camouflaged, making opposing Pokémon unable to target it, and starts gaining critical counters (up to a maximum of 3). A critical counter is gained as soon as Inteleon is camouflaged, with a new counter gained every 3s while camouflaged. Hitting any Pokémon prevents Inteleon from becoming camouflaged for 3s. When a critical counter is consumed, Inteleon's next attack or move that can critically strike is guaranteed to be a critical hit.

Critical hits deal 250% rather than 200% damage.

Inteleon.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage with an increased critical-hit rate.

Move 1.Name: Tearful Look
Move 1.Description: Decreases the Attack and Sp. Atk of the target Pokémon by 20% for 3s. Inteleon gains a critical counter and increases its movement speed.

Upgrade 1.Name: Fell Stinger
Upgrade 1.Description: Inteleon fires a sharp stinger in the designated direction. The stinger stops at the first Pokémon hit or when it reaches a wall. Inteleon gains two critical counters if either a Pokémon is hit or a wall is hit. If it hits a Pokémon it deals damage. If it hits a wall, this move's cooldown is reduced by half and Inteleon is pulled to the wall and starts camouflaging.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Acrobatics
Upgrade 2.Description:
Inteleon glides in the designated direction. If it hits a Pokémon or a wall, it can glide in a designated direction a second time. If Inteleon hits a Pokémon while gliding, Inteleon deals damage to it and decreases its movement speed by 30% for 2s. Every time Inteleon glides in a designated direction, it gains a critical counter. If Inteleon bounces off a wall or Pokémon, Liquidation's current cooldown is reduced by 40%.

This move can also be used while attacking with Liquidation.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the first glide's travel distance.

Move 2.Name: Water Gun
Move 2.Description: Inteleon squirts water, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits.

Upgrade 1.Name: Snipe Shot
Upgrade 1.Description: Inteleon aims for up to 6s and then fires, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits while partially ignoring their Sp. Def. by 15%/20%/25% depending on distance (close, mid, far respectively). Aiming reduces the possible spread of the shot, reaching maximum precision after aiming for 1.25s. The farther away the user is from the Pokémon it hits, the more damage it does. A maximum of three uses can be kept in reserve for this move. There is a 1.5s cooldown between uses.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Reduces the cooldown for charges by 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Liquidation
Upgrade 2.Description: Inteleon starts firing water projectiles at the designated Pokémon. Inteleon fires a total of 8 projectiles in 1.7s and is slowed by 40% while firing. Water projectiles can hit targets other than the designated Pokémon and only deal damage to the first Pokémon they hit. If this move hits the same Pokémon 5 times in a short time, Inteleon will deal 20% increased damage to this Pokémon for 3s.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the number of projectiles shot during the duration to 10.

Unite Move.Name: Azure Spy Vision
Unite Move.Description:
For 10.5s, Inteleon can see nearby Pokémon that are in stealth or hiding in tall grass.

While active, also doubles Inteleon's critical-hit rate, and gives 1 critical counter per second.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 20% Max HP Shield, 30% Movement Speed, 35% Attack Speed

Passive Ability.Name: Levitate
Passive Ability.Description:
After using a move: increases movement speed by 50% for 2s (decaying by 5% every 0.25s).

Increases movement speed by 10% while near an ally Latias. When not in combat, this Ability can be used to fly to an allied Latias. This Ability goes on cooldown for 90s after it's triggered for both Latios and Latias. While channeling this ability the user can move around, once the 2s channel is completed the user becomes unstoppable and flies to where Latias was when this ability was activated. If Latias is at home base, the cooldown of Levitate will go down twice as fast for Latios.

Latios.Attack:
Shoots a psychic projectile at an opposing Pokémon, damaging them.

Latios has no boosted attack.

Move 1.Name: Confusion
Move 1.Description: Releases a weak telekinetic force in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon hit and decreasing their movement speed by 20% for 2s.

Upgrade 1.Name: Luster Purge
Upgrade 1.Description:
Lets loose a ball of light that moves in the designated direction. When used again (automatically after 0.85s): releases the ball's light all at once, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect; and marking them for 3s. This move then goes on cooldown.

Latios and any allied Latias deal 20% increased damage to marked opposing Pokémon. This mark can be cleansed.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increased mark duration to 6s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Telekinesis
Upgrade 2.Description:
Unleashes psychic power in the designated direction, damaging the first opposing Pokémon hit, decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2s; and marking the target for 4s. This move may be used again afterwards. When used again: unleashes psychic power at the designated opposing Pokémon, decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2s when it hits. This move goes on cooldown when the mark is consumed or cleansed.

If the target of the second use is already marked by the first use or the first use missed: stuns that target for 1s when the psychic power hits, consuming the mark. If the target of the second use is a different, unmarked opposing Pokémon: the two targets are pulled a set distance toward each other over 0.7s. The two Pokémon are stunned for 1s while being pulled together. If they collide with one another, they are thrown away from each other and their marks are consumed.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Strengthened movement speed decrease duration to 3s.

Move 2.Name: Swift
Move 2.Description: Shoots star-shaped rays in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect.

Upgrade 1.Name: Dragon Pulse
Upgrade 1.Description:
After learning this move: Latios gains 2 Eon power for knocking out a wild Pokémon; or 3 Eon power per Pokémon from the opposing team hit by this move's boosted attack. When this move is used: Latios dashes forward, empowering the next basic attack used within 5s to be a special boosted attack that hits in a straight line, damaging opposing Pokémon hit. The move goes on cooldown when the boosted attack is used or after 5s.

This move gains 2 telekinetic projectiles at 25 and 100 Eon power, and gains 1 projectile at 50 and 75 Eon power for a total of 6 projectiles. Subsequent projectiles hitting the same target deal 15% less damage; further decreasing with each projectile to a maximum of 75% less damage. For every 1 Eon power accumulated beyond 100; the projectile damage increases by 0.5% (Eon power caps at 1099).
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: The telekinetic projectiles deal an additional 3% missing HP damage to the target.

Upgrade 2.Name: Draco Meteor
Upgrade 2.Description:
After learning this move: Latios gains 2 Eon power for knocking out a wild Pokémon; or 3 Eon power per Pokémon from the opposing team hit during this move. When this move is used: 2 comets crash onto the designated area, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect with each comet.

This move gains 1 additional comet for every 25 Eon power accumulated, with a maximum of 6 comets at 100 Eon power. Subsequent comets that hit the same target deal 50% less damage. For every 1 Eon power accumulated beyond 100: increases comet damage by 0.5% (Eon power caps at 1099).
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Comets deal an additional 3% missing HP damage to opposing Pokémon hit.

Unite Move.Name: Eon Blast
Unite Move.Description:
Aims at the designated Pokémon from the opposing team and charges power for 1.8s before releasing a pulse, damaging all opposing Pokémon hit. Resets move cooldowns immediately after releasing the pulse, and increases cooldown reduction to 60% for 9.5s.

If Latias is also aiming its Unite Move at the designated Pokémon from the opposing team, the pulses stack and explode, dealing damage around the target as well. If Eon Blast hits last then the explosion uses Latios' stats.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 30% CDR, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Cute Charm
Passive Ability.Description: When hit by an enemies attack at close range, make that enemy infatuated for a short time. Infatuated enemies become enthralled and approach Wigglytuff against their will. The effects of this ability have a cooldown and cannot trigger on the same enemy in quick succession.

Wigglytuff.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to enemies and spinning them around when it hits.

Move 1.Name: Pound
Move 1.Description: Perform a combo attack in front, dealing damage to enemies and decreasing their movement speed for a short time when the attack hits.

Upgrade 1.Name: Double Slap
Upgrade 1.Description:
Perform a combo attack in front, dealing damage to enemies and decreasing their movement speed for a short time when the attack hits.

Increased number of attacks.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Slaps 4-6 times instead.

Upgrade 2.Name: Dazzling Gleam
Upgrade 2.Description:
Emit a powerful flash in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect twice.

Also decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time when the first hit of this move deals damage to them.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Slows enemies hit by the first flash by 40% for 1s.

Move 2.Name: Defense Curl
Move 2.Description: Perform a quick roll, granting the user a shield and throwing any enemies hit by the roll. Hitting an obstacle while rolling will change the direction the user is moving and reset the cooldown of Pound, Double Slap, or Dazzling Gleam.

Upgrade 1.Name: Rollout
Upgrade 1.Description:
Perform a quick roll, granting the user a shield. Also deals damage to enemies hit by the roll and throws them. Hitting an obstacle while rolling will change the direction the user is moving and reset the cooldown of Pound, Double Slap, or Dazzling Gleam.

Increases the length of time enemies are thrown.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the amount of time enemies are thrown in the air to 0.7s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Sing
Upgrade 2.Description:
Wigglytuff begins singing, slowing enemies around them by 15% for 2s per "Note" and increasing Wigglytuff's movement speed by 30% for 2.5s. Enemies that stay inside the song's effect will be put to sleep (when reaching 4 Notes) for 1.5s, and have their Defense and Special Defense reduced by 25% for 1.5s.

Increases the amount of time enemies are asleep to 1.75s and the duration of Defense and Sp. Defense reduction to 1.75s.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the amount of time enemies are asleep to 1.75s and the duration of Defense and Sp. Defense reduction to 1.75s.

Unite Move.Name: Starlight Recital
Unite Move.Description: Begin performing a recital, granting the user and nearby allies a shield as well as removing all status conditions from the affected allies and make them immune to hindrances for a short time.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 30% CDR, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Aroma Veil
Passive Ability.Description:
When an ally is under the effect of one of Alcremie's shields or buffs, remove any hindrances that are applied or are currently affecting that ally. This ability will go on cooldown for 10s after removing a hindrance. This ability can also work on Alcremie as well.

When Milcery evolves into Alcremie, gain a Sweet Gauge. When the Sweet Gauge is filled at 15 stacks, the cooldown of one charge of Recover and Decorate will be reset. These moves will also be empowered.

Alcremie.Attack:
Attacks by throwing whip cream.

Milcery and Alcremie do not have a boosted attack.

Move 1.Name: Helping Hand
Move 1.Description: Grant a designated ally Pokémon or yourself a shield for 3s, in addition to increasing the recipients Attack by 40 and Special Attack by 25 for 3s

Upgrade 1.Name: Decorate
Upgrade 1.Description:
Grant a designated ally Pokémon or yourself a shield for 4s. If the shield is granted to an ally Pokémon, Alcremie receives an extra shield of the same value. Basic and boosted attacks by the shielded Pokémon will deal additional damage and increase Alcremie's Sweet Gauge by 1 for 6s. The extra shield Alcremie receives when using Decorate on an ally does not apply additional damage to Alcremie's attacks. Alcremie's basic attacks will also increase the Sweet Gauge by 1. When empowered by a full Sweet Gauge, the attacks deal even more additional damage.

The additional damage depends on the shielded Pokémon's level. Only one main Decorate shield can be active at a time.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the strength of the shield.

Upgrade 2.Name: Recover
Upgrade 2.Description:
Place a dollop of whipped cream at a designated location for up to 20s. When an ally Pokémon picks up the whipped cream, their HP is restored and their movement speed is increased by 15% for 2s. When whipped cream is consumed by ally Pokémon, the Sweet Gauge is also increased by 3. When the Sweet Gauge is full, the next dollop becomes sweeter, restoring more HP and increasing their movement speed by 40% for 2s instead and increases the Sweet Gauge by 5. Two dollops may be kept in reserve.

An ally Snorlax will heal additional HP from the dollops.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: The maximum number of uses that can be kept in reserve is increased to 3.

Move 2.Name: Charm
Move 2.Description: Charm a target Pokémon with your cute voice, dealing damage to the first Pokémon hit. Pokémon hit by the charm have their Attack reduced by 30 and Special Attack reduced by 20 and movement speed reduced by 30% for 2s. Additionally, increases the sweet gauge by 2.

Upgrade 1.Name: Dazzling Gleam
Upgrade 1.Description:
Release a conal ray of light in a designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon, stunning them for 0.4s and increasing the Sweet Gauge by 4 for every opposing Pokémon hit. If an ally Pokémon has been affected by Decorate, the decorated Pokémon will also release a conal ray of light.

Alcremie can move around while casting this move, but is slowed by 20%.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the damage of this move.

Upgrade 2.Name: Sweet Scent
Upgrade 2.Description: Launch a sweet scent at a designated location, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area and lowering their movement speed by 30%, decaying by 10% every 0.5s. The outer ring of the scent remains for 3s, dealing damage, applying a 100% slow lasting 0.5s to oppposing Pokémon who touch the ring. Both the intial area and outer ring can hit at the same time. Increases the Sweet Gauge by 2 for every hit.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the duration of the outer ring slow to 1.5s.

Unite Move.Name: Fluffy Cream Supreme
Unite Move.Description:
Create a giant cake and stand atop it becoming unstoppable and gaining a shield for 6s. Then throw whipped cream at allies. Allies who receive whipped cream are healed and have their maximum HP buffed for 8s. This move ends early if this move's shield is lost, Alcremie becomes bound, or if the move is manually cancelled.

The shield is 60% of Alcremie's max HP
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 40% Movement Speed, 30% CDR, 30% Max HP Shield (Applied when the move ends)

Passive Ability.Name: Bad Dreams
Passive Ability.Description: When an enemy is forcibly put to sleep near Darkrai, Darkrai deals damage to the target and gains a boosted attack. When Darkrai uses this boosted, every enemy that has been marked with bad dreams in the last 2.7s is attacked simultaneously.  Sleeping enemies near Darkrai take damage over time, and Darkrai deals 10% more damage to them while they remain asleep. Damage from this Ability doesn't wake up sleeping enemies.

Darkrai.Attack: Basic attacks made against sleeping enemies will become boosted attacks with greatly increased range. Boosted attacks deal damage to enemies with an attack from a void and restore Darkrai's HP. Darkrai does not require vision to perform a boosted attack against a sleeping target.

Move 1.Name: Hypnosis
Move 1.Description: Send a hypnotic suggestion in the designated direction, dealing damage to the first enemy it hits. After 1s, the enemy will fall asleep for 2s.

Upgrade 1.Name: Dark Void
Upgrade 1.Description: Fire a ball of darkness at an enemy. Additional balls of darkness will be thrown at each enemy within in the area of effect. Enemies hit will be dealt damage and marked. The mark lasts 5s. When Darkrai deals damage to marked enemy, the marks are removed and the Enemy falls asleep for 2s.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Applies a 40% slow for 3s when applying a mark to an enemy.

Upgrade 2.Name: Shadow Claw
Upgrade 2.Description: Slash in a designated direction with sharp claws made from shadows, dealing damage in a line, applying a 40% slow for 3s and marking enemies hit. When the user deals damage twice to marked enemies, that marked enemy falls asleep for 2s and has their mark removed. When this move hits, this move can be used again. The second use of this move hits a designated target with huge claws, dealing damage. If there are any opposing Pokémon suffering from Bad Dreams, the second use of this move will deal increased damage.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the damage dealt by this move.

Move 2.Name: Calm Mind
Move 2.Description: The user focuses their mind, increasing their Special Attack and Special Defense by 30% for 3s and Movement Speed by 50% for 3s, decaying by 10% every 0.5 seconds to a minimum of 10%.

Upgrade 1.Name: Nasty Plot
Upgrade 1.Description:
Dash a short distance, gaining a Nasty Plot counter for 7s and refreshing the duration of all current counters. Upon using a basic attack, consume all nasty plot counters to deal damage to one of the targets hit. Upon using a boosted attack, turn the boosted and all nasty plot counters into a series of projectiles, hitting every target of Darkrai's boosted.

A maximum of two counters may be held. Nasty Plot has no cooldown between dashes.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Gain one charge of this move in reserve when an enemy falls asleep.

Upgrade 2.Name: Dark Pulse
Upgrade 2.Description:
Hide in a shadow and create additional shadows around the hiding spot. Darkrai may freely move between the shadows. When this move is used again and held, the move ends and Darkrai appears from the shadow it dealt damage from. When this move is used again but is not held or after 4s elapses, Darkrai appears from the shadow they are currently hiding in, deals damage to enemies hit, then returns to the original shadow. Dark Pulse may then be used one more time if the move was only tapped. Darkrai will leave the shadow after 4s, dealing damage to all enemies in the shadow that Darkrai appears from.

While hiding, Shadow Claw may be used to attack from the shadow that is being hidden in. Shadow Claws used this way will not apply the Shadow Claw mark to targets hit and deals reduced damage.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Dealing damage with this move causes Darkrai to gain a shield for 2.5 seconds.

Unite Move.Name: Worst Nightmare
Unite Move.Description:
The user becomes unstoppable and casts a sleeping spell on the designated Pokémon from the opposing team. If the target is successfully put to sleep, the user's moves' cooldowns are reset, the target is marked to receive 3% max HP damage over time every 0.5s over 10s (up to 21 times; maximum 63% max HP damage as Sp. Atk-based damage), and the user sends that target into a nightmare realm centered on their initial location for up to 8s. The user follows the target into the nightmare realm. While inside the nightmare realm, Darkrai and the target are unaffected by goal zones, jump pads, and Berries. Other Pokémon outside of the nightmare realm cannot target Darkrai or their target while they're inside.

If the designated Pokémon from the opposing team cannot be put to sleep, this Unite Move is canceled and 90% of the Unite Move gauge is refunded. This energy regeneration is affected by Energy Amplifier.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 80% Movement Speed, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Steelworker
Passive Ability.Description: Dhelmise is granted a shield whenever one of the user's moves deals damage to Pokémon from the opposing team (5s cd). Each time this Ability or other effects grant the Pokémon a shield, the Pokémon's next basic attack deals increased damage. This effect can stack up to 3 times. When the shield granted by this ability expires after 3s, HP proportional to the amount of remaining shields is restored.

Dhelmise.Attack:
The user attacks by slamming their body.

Dhelmise has no boosted attack.

Move 1.Name: Payback
Move 1.Description: Has the user swing their anchor, dealing damage and applying a 30% slow for 2s to opposing Pokémon hit. The user deals increased damage if Dhelmise was hit with an attack while this move is being used.

Upgrade 1.Name: Power Whip
Upgrade 1.Description: Has the user slash their anchor horizontally in front of themself, dealing damage, applying a 40% slow for 2s, and granting the user a shield for 3s. The edge of the anchor deals additional damage and leaves the opposing Pokémon it hits unable to act for 0.5s instead of slowing them.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the duration opposing Pokémon are left unable to act to 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Whirlpool
Upgrade 2.Description:
Dhelmise swings their anchor diagonally, dealing damage and applying a 40% slow for 2s to opposing Pokémon hit. Every third time this move is used, it generates a whirlpool centered on the user for 2s, continuously pulling in nearby opposing Pokémon every tick. This move's cooldown is reduced by 0.8s every time Dhelmise hits with a basic attack.

Dhelmise can auto attack and cast moves while the whirlpool is active.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Further reduces this move's cooldown by 1.5s every time the user hits with a basic attack.

Move 2.Name: Bulldoze
Move 2.Description: Has the user shake the ground by slamming their anchor, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and throwing them for 0.5s.

Upgrade 1.Name: Anchor Shot
Upgrade 1.Description:
Has the user throw their anchor in a designated direction catching the first opposing Pokémon hit, dealing damage and leaving them unable to act. The user then pulls the target toward Dhelmise.

Stun duration is 0.6s from close range, and 0.8s at max range.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Debuffs the targeted opposing Pokémon, increasing the amount of damage they receive from all sources by 50% for 0.8s or for as long as the target is being incapacitated.

Upgrade 2.Name: Heavy Slam
Upgrade 2.Description: The user lobs their anchor in a designated direction dealing damage to opposing Pokémon at the central point of impact and leaving them unable to act for 0.5s. Opposing Pokémon near the point of impact take damage and are slowed by 40% for 2s. The user then slams their heavy body down at the anchor's point of impact, dealing damage and applying an additional 40% slow for 2s to opposing Pokémon hit.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: When the user slams their heavy body down, opposing Pokémon at the center of the point of impact are left unable to act for 0.5s.

Unite Move.Name: Seaweed Snare
Unite Move.Description:
Has the user throw their anchor and ensnare a designated Pokémon from the opposing team, dealing damage and leaving the target unable to act for 0.45s. The user then charges at the target, dealing damage and leaving them unable to act for 0.45s. If other Pokémon from the opposing team are hit by the anchor or the charge, they take damage and are shoved for 0.7s.

Applies a cleansable damage over time effect to Pokémon on the opposing team that deals damage on hit and every 0.5s up to 9 times, healing Dhelmise with each tick based on damage dealt. The duration of the DoT is refreshed with each hit of the Unite Move.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 30% CDR, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Heavy Metal
Passive Ability.Description: Prevents Duraludon from being thrown or shoved by the first attempt to shove or throw them. This ability goes on cooldown after it's triggered (50s cd).

Duraludon.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, shooting a long beam that deals a large amount of damage to all enemies hit.

Move 1.Name: Laser Focus
Move 1.Description: Reduces damage received for a short time. Afterward, Duraludon's basic attacks deal additional damage to enemies hit. This buff expires after 8s or after 3 basic attacks.

Upgrade 1.Name: Flash Cannon
Upgrade 1.Description:
Duraludon ruptures the ground around themself and in a designated direction; dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed by 50% for 1s. Afterward, go into "Cannon Mode" rooting Duraludon for 6s or if a basic attack is not made for 2.5s or this move can be cancelled early. While in Cannon Mode, basic attacks have longer range, attack speed is increased by 100% but decays by 20% per second over 5 seconds, dealing increased damage and splash damage. Exiting "Cannon mode" will prematurely remove the attack speed buff. Metal Claw, Stealth Rock, Dragon Tail, and boosted attacks can be used while in this mode and boosted attacks decrease the movement speed of enemies hit by 60% for 1s and also pierce.

Enemies in the ruptured ground's area of effect are also unable to act for 1s.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Enemies in the ruptured ground's area of effect are also unable to act for 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Dragon Pulse
Upgrade 2.Description:
Charges power before dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect. Duraludon's movement speed is decreased while charging, but the longer power is charged, the wider the move's area of effect becomes and the more damage it deals. After learning this move, a damage marker will be attached to any enemy Duraludon damages. When Dragon Pulse hits a marked enemy, it deals additional damage to that target for each damage marker attached to it, then removes all of the damage markers. In addition, if this move knocks out an enemy, the cooldown is reduced by 50% and the next 3 basic attacks will each deal additional damage and further reduce this move's cooldown when they hit.

Also restores Duraludon's HP if this move knocks out an enemy player.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Also restores 8% of Duraludon's max HP if this move knocks out an enemy player.

Move 2.Name: Metal Claw
Move 2.Description: Strike with sharp claws; dealing damage to enemies hit and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. After this move is used, Duraludon's next basic attack becomes a boosted attack.

Upgrade 1.Name: Dragon Tail
Upgrade 1.Description:
Duraludon shoves enemies and moves itself backward a short distance. The next basic attack becomes a boosted attack. A maximum of two uses can be kept in reserve for this move. There is a 1.1s cooldown between uses. This move can penetrate through walls.

Increased damage.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Apply a mark for 5s that is consumed the next time Duraludon damages them, dealing additional damage.

Upgrade 2.Name: Stealth Rock
Upgrade 2.Description:
Hurl a stone at the designated area, creating an invisible field of stones. The field deals damage over time to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time. If the hurled stone hits an enemy before the designated area, the area of effect will instead be centered on where the stone hit that Pokémon. Once an enemy takes damage from the field, it will become visible to enemies.  If an enemy takes damage from this move 4 times, that enemy becomes unable to move for a short time. After this move is used, Duraludon's next basic attack becomes a boosted attack. A maximum of two uses can be kept in reserve for this move. There is a 1.1s cooldown between uses.

Increases the maximum number of uses that can be kept in reserve for this move.

A maximum of 2 Stealth Rocks may be on the game field at one time, but 2 more can still be kept in reserve.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Stores 3 uses in reserve instead.

Unite Move.Name: Revolving Ruin
Unite Move.Description: Fire a beam of light at the ground in a sweeping circle around Duraludon. If this beam hits an enemy, it deals damage to them, grants Duraludon a shield and increases their Attack by 8% for a short time. Both the shield effect and the Attack increase are strengthened for each enemy that is hit by the beam. Damage is dealt to any enemy in the area of effect after the beam of light is fired. A burning ring is also left where the beam of light touched the ground, and enemies that touch this ring take additional damage and have their movement speed decreased by 50% for 1s refreshing as damage continus to be taken from the burning ground.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 35% Attack Speed, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Blaze
Passive Ability.Description: When this Pokémon hits an enemy with an auto attack or move, that enemy receives a fire fragment for 4s and the duration of all other fire fragments on that enemy are refreshed. When an enemy has 5 fire fragments, all 5 are consumed to deal additional damage to the enemy and restore the user's HP. When this Pokémon's HP is at half or lower, more HP is restored.

Blaziken.Attack:
Deals damage to nearby enemies. While in Kick Style, basic attacks have a higher area-of-effect and reach. While in Punch Style, attack speed is increased by 40%.

For the purpose of auto attacks, Torchic is treated as punch style while Combusken is treated as kick style. Once Blaziken has access to their Unite move, they can swap between styles.

Move 1.Name: Aerial Ace
Move 1.Description: Dash in a designated direction, dealing damage to enemies that come in contact with the dash. If this move hits an enemy, this move may be used again once within 4 seconds before being put on cooldown.

Upgrade 1.Name: Fire Punch
Upgrade 1.Description: Unleash 2 flaming punches in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. The designated direction can be changed during this move. When the user hits an enemy with this move, for a short time, this move can be used once more.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases damage dealt.

Upgrade 2.Name: Overheat
Upgrade 2.Description: Become Hindrance Resistant, reduce incoming damage by 25%, and charge power in place in a designated direction. If used again, unleash a flaming kick in the designed direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. The longer the duration the charge is held for, the more damage this move deals. If the user charges a certain amount of power (when the gauge reaches the line indicator), this move also shoves enemies hit.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases damage dealt.

Move 2.Name: Ember
Move 2.Description: Release a small ball of fire in the designated direction, dealing damage in a small area around the first enemy hit and decreases their movement speed by 50% for 1s.

Upgrade 1.Name: Focus Blast
Upgrade 1.Description: Fire a ball of focused energy in the designated direction. The ball of focused energy explodes upon hitting an enemy or after traveling a set distance, dealing damage to enemies  in the explosion's area-of-effect and decreasing their movement speed by 35% for 2s.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the movement speed decrease to 60%.

Upgrade 2.Name: Blaze Kick
Upgrade 2.Description: Jump backwards then kick while leaping towards a designated location, becoming Unstoppable during the jump and kick animation. Deal damage to enemies hit by the kick and shove them. The shoved enemies will have their movement speed decreased by 30% for 2s. If the shoved enemies come in contact with a wall, they will be stunned instead for 1s. Blaze Kick cannot go over walls.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the movement speed decrease to 50%. Increases the stun duration to 1.5s if hitting a wall.

Unite Move.Name: Spinning Flame Kick
Unite Move.Description: Perform a flaming kick around itself, dealing damage to nearby enemies hit and increase the user's Attack stat by 30% for a 4s. After using this move, the user switches to Kick Style and all Kick Style cooldowns are reset.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 9% Max HP Shield; Has an internal cooldown of 30s to activate Energy Amplifier; Has an internal cooldown of 60s to activate Buddy Barrier

Passive Ability.Name: Anticipation
Passive Ability.Description: When Eevee would be shoved, thrown or left unabled to act, that effect is negated. This effect goes on a 40s cooldown after being triggered and is reset after respawning.
Passive Ability.Description 2: When Umbreon would be shoved, thrown or left unabled to act, that effect is negated. Umbreon becomes unstoppable for 1.2s afterwards and also its Defense and Sp. Def are increased by 30% for 3s. This effect goes on a 40s cooldown after being triggered and is reset after respawning.

Umbreon.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack every third attack, lunging at a Pokémon  and dealing damage. This boosted attack also heals the user's HP. The lower the user's remaining HP, the more HP is restored.

Move 1.Name: Swift
Move 1.Description: Shoot 1 large and 3 small star-shaped rays, dealing damage to Pokémon and applying a mark to them after the fourth star hits that lasts 4s. When near a marked Pokémon, Eevee receives a 15% movement speed increase. When Eevee deals damage to a marked Pokémon, its next basic attack becomes a boosted attack.

Upgrade 1.Name: Mean Look
Upgrade 1.Description:
Pins an enemy Pokémon with a dark, arresting look, slowing them by 30% for 2s. After a 0.5s delay, the enemy is surrounded by a black zone they cannot leave for 3s. While inside the black zone, Umbreon’s basic attacks become boosted and deal increased damage. The black zone is removed if the target enemy is knocked out.

Mean Look is cleansable if the cleanse is used when the laser connects and before the area appears on the ground.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the duration of the black zone to 3.5s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Foul Play
Upgrade 2.Description: Charges in a direction, dealing damage to Pokémon hit and slowing them by 15% for 2.5s. If the charge hits a Pokémon, this move can be used again within 6s and it will note the highest Attack stat of all enemies hit. If this move is used again, Umbreon sweeps in front of itself with its tail, dealing damage to Pokémon hit, slowing them by 30% for 2.5s and shoving them for 0.6s. If the highest enemy Attack was greater than Umbreon's Attack when the first stage hit, the second stage deals damage using the noted Attack. Otherwise it uses Umbreon's current Attack.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Umbreon's next basic attack after using this move becomes a boosted attack.

Move 2.Name: Fake Tears
Move 2.Description: Feigns crying, dealing damage to nearby Pokémon  and decreases their Defense and Sp. Def by 20% for 2s. Also grants a shield for 4s.

Upgrade 1.Name: Wish
Upgrade 1.Description: Wishes for an ally Pokémon or Umbreon. For 2s, that Pokémon receives 15% reduced damage, then afterward, the wish comes true and heals them. If the targeted Pokémon is knocked out before the wish comes true, a different ally Pokémon near them takes the wish instead.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the damage reduction to 25% and amount of healing when the wish comes true.

Upgrade 2.Name: Snarl
Upgrade 2.Description: Becomes hindrance resistant and begin snarling for 1.5s, dealing damage to enemy Pokémon in the area around Umbreon and decreasing the affected Pokémon's Attack and Sp. Atk stat by 3% for 1.5s and movement speed by 15% for 2s. Also grants the user a shield for 2s. Umbreon is slowed by 30% while snarling. The final shout leaves enemy Pokémon stunned for 0.7s and further decreases their Attack and Sp. Atk by 15% for 3s. The small shout Attack and Sp. Atk decreases can stack up to 6 times and stack with the big shout's Attack and Sp. Atk decreases.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the stun duration of the final shout to 1s.

Unite Move.Name: Moonlight Prance
Unite Move.Description:
Umbreon briefly becomes unstoppable, leaping up and absorbing 50% of the shields from enemy Pokémon in an area around Umbreon, taking them for the user. Umbreon then lands, dealing damage to Pokémon in an area-of-effect, and stuns them for 1s. For 5s, enemy Pokémon in the area around Umbreon are slowed by 30%, and if an enemy Pokémon in that area is granted a shield, Umbreon absorbs 50% of the shield for themself. Additionally, after learning this move and while not in combat, Umbreon continually recovers 1% Max HP every second.

Note: Umbreon cannot steal shields granted by Rayquaza or Assault Vest.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 10% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Synchronize
Passive Ability.Description: When an enemy inflicts decreased movement speed or a damge-over-time condition on the Pokémon, the same is inflicted on that opponent. This ability goes on cooldown after it's triggered.

Gardevoir.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, it deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their Sp. Defense by 10% for a short time.

Move 1.Name: Confusion
Move 1.Description: Attacks straight in the designated direction.

Upgrade 1.Name: Psychic
Upgrade 1.Description:
After hitting an enemy or traveling its maximum distance, deals damage over time to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed and Sp. Defense by 20%, stacking up to 3 times.

Reduced cooldown.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Moonblast
Upgrade 2.Description:
Has the user attack while moving back to create distance. When the move's blast hits, it deals damage to enemies in a cone and leaves the enemy closest to the user unable to act for a short time.

Also grants a shield when this move is used.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Grants the user a shield for 3s when launching the blast.

Move 2.Name: Teleport
Move 2.Description:
Has the user warp to the designated area, increasing the damage dealt by one basic attack after warping.

When this move is learned, passively increases the damage of Synchronize, auto attacks, and Confusion by 15% until this move is replaced.

Upgrade 1.Name: Psyshock
Upgrade 1.Description:
Attacks the designated location three times. This move's cooldown is reduced each time one of these attacks hits an enemy.

Increase the damage this move deals each time one of its attacks hits.

The user is able to attack and move freely while channeling this move.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the damage of the next attack to hit each time an attack hits an opposing Pokémon.

Upgrade 2.Name: Future Sight
Upgrade 2.Description:
Sets a delayed explosion. When the explosion hits an enemy, it reduces this move's cooldown.

Reset this move's cooldown when the explosion hits an enemy.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Resets this move's cooldown when it hits a Pokémon from the opposing team.

Unite Move.Name: Fairy Singularity
Unite Move.Description: Warps Space in the designated area, drawing in enemies to the center. Shoves and deals damage to enemies the instant the warped space disappears.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 30% CDR, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Overgrow
Passive Ability.Description: When the user is at 50% max HP or less, if they would take damage they instead disappear into leaves, becoming invisible for 1.5s or until attacking (60s CD). This effect also increases the user's movement speed by 15%, damage by 15% and heals by 15% of the damage dealt for 4s.

Meowscarada.Attack: Gains a boosted attack every 5 seconds that leaps towards the target dealing additional damage.

Move 1.Name: Leafage
Move 1.Description: Launch 4 leaves that deal damage to enemies hit and decrease their movement speed by 50% for 2.5s. When an enemy is hit by a leaf, subsequent leaves deal 20% reduced damage.

Upgrade 1.Name: Flower Trick
Upgrade 1.Description: Attach a flower bomb to an enemy that lasts up to 5s. This move can be used again to detonate the flower bomb at will. When it explodes it deals damage and additional damage equal to 18% of the target's missing HP. Against Wild Pokémon: The additional damage from missing HP is capped at 1000. If an enemy that has a flower bomb attached to them is damaged by Meowscarada, the explosion's area of effect and damage are increased. If the explosion knocks out an enemy player with this move, the move's cooldown is reset.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the range of application and explosion's area of effect. Also increases movement speed when planting the seed by 30% for 3s diminishing by 10% every 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Night Slash
Upgrade 2.Description: The users throws 3 slashing waves with their claws, dealing damage and applying a mark for 5s to enemies hit. Subsequent waves deal 50% damage of the first. Basic attacks by Meowscarada have 50% increased critical-hit rate on marked enemies. When Meowscarada deals damage to marked enemies with basic attacks, this move's cooldown is reduced by 0.5s and Meowscarada recovers HP. The HP recovery works in a cycle of 3 basic attacks; the first attack will heal 100% of the ratio, the second 50% and the third 10%, then the fourth will heal 100% of the ratio again.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the critical-hit rate on marked enemies to a 65% increase and restores additional HP from hitting marked targets.

Move 2.Name: Hone Claws
Move 2.Description: Dash in a designated direction while sharpening claws, increasing attack speed by 80% and increasing the damage of the next three basic attacks for 3s.

Upgrade 1.Name: Double Team
Upgrade 1.Description: Dash and create an illusory copy in order to befuddle enemies. The clone has the same HP and defenses as Meowscarada but takes 30% more damage and lasts for 3.3s. If this move is used again, the user swaps places with the illusory copy, dispelling the copy and creating an explosion of petals at both the clone and Meowscarada's positions that deal damage and leave enemies hit unable to act for 0.8s. Enemies may only take damage from one petal explosion. If the clone's HP were to reach 0 before a swap, the same type of petal explosion occurs at the clone's location only. Creating the clone also increases Meowscarada's movement speed by 70% for 3s diminishing by 10% every 0.5s. Cooldown starts when first used.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the duration of the clone to 4.6s and sets the increased damage the clone receives to 20%.

Upgrade 2.Name: Trailblaze
Upgrade 2.Description: Leap to the designated location, dealing damage to enemies hit and leaving them paralyzed, decreasing their attack speed by 40% and movement speed by 40% for 2s. If Meowscarada hits enemies with this move, Meowscarada's basic attack speed is increased by 100% for 4s and movement speed is increased by 60% for 4s diminishing by 5% every 0.5s down to minimum of 35%. When used from tall grass, this move's leap range increases. If Meowscarada knocks out an enemy player or makes an assist, this move's cooldown is reset.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Grants a shield that lasts 3 seconds when used.

Unite Move.Name: Floral Flourish
Unite Move.Description: Move instantly to the designated location, creating a whirlwind around Meowscarada for 3s that continually deals damage to enemies every 0.25s, up to 13 times. During the blink, Meowsacarda is Invincible. Then, Meowscarada will slowly walk forward with the storm. While using this move, the user cannot use other attacks or change directions without the use of Eject Button, and the move can be stopped if it is used again. Hits on enemy Pokémon reduce the cooldown of Night Slash and Flower Trick by 1 second per enemy hit.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 80% Movement Speed, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Solar Power
Passive Ability.Description: When the user uses a move, it deals additional damage but loses 5% of its current HP. This Ability's effect does not trigger when the user is in tall grass. When the user deals damage with a basic attack to opposing Pokémon that have been burned by its moves, the user restores 3% of its missing HP.

Mega Charizard X.Attack: Breathes fire at opposing Pokémon, dealing damage 4 times per basic attack. Charizard may move while attacking but is slowed by 5% while breathing fire. Charizard deals additional damage to opposing Pokémon that have been burned by the user's moves. This additional damage cannot land critical hits; additional damage benefits from regular lifesteal. Basic attacks gain increased range upon evolving into Charmeleon and into Charizard. When mega evolving into Mega Charizard X, basic attack range is decreased but width is increased.

Move 1.Name: Flame Burst
Move 1.Description:
Attack with a bursting flame. When this move hits, it leaves enemies burned and increases the user's movement speed for a short time.

The Attack of opposing Pokémon burned by this move is decreased by 5%.

Upgrade 1.Name: Fire Punch
Upgrade 1.Description:
Attack with an intense blast of fire. When this move hits, it leaves enemies burned and increases the user's movement speed for a short time.

Increased damage and the damage caused by burning.

The Attack of the target burned by this move is decreased by 5%. When the user is mega evolved, instead burns all opposing Pokémon hit.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Reduces this move's cooldown by 0.4s per target hit every time the user's basic attack hits an opposing Pokémon. (1.6s total for an entire basic attack animation on a single target).

Move 2.Name: Fire Spin
Move 2.Description: Encircles enemies in the area of effect in a vortex of fire. After this move hits, it deals damage over time and decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time.

Upgrade 1.Name: Flare Blitz
Upgrade 1.Description:
Charge forward cloaked in fire, granting the user a shield and throwing enemies hit.

Decreases movement speed of enemies for a short time when they are thrown.

When the user is mega evolved, reduces the cooldown by 40% of its current cooldown if it hits an enemy player and knocks up all opposing Pokémon hit by the explosion.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Decreases the movement speed of the target by 40% for 3s when this move hits.

Unite Move.Name: Seismic Slam
Unite Move.Description: The user briefly becomes unstoppable and grabs the designated Pokémon from the opposing team. The target is bound, and the user and the target become invincible as the user flies up then slams them onto the ground, damaging the target and nearby opposing Pokémon, dealing an additional 8% max HP damage to each opposing Pokémon hit. The user then mega evolves into Mega Charizard X for 20 seconds. During Mega evolution, Mega Charizard X receives 50% movement speed increase.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Sturdy
Passive Ability.Description: Gains a stacking Def/SpDef buff for every 7% HP missing. Stacks up to 10 times.

Crustle.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, it deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

Move 1.Name: Rock Slide
Move 1.Description: Drops large rocks on the designated area. When this move hits, it deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and leaves them unable to act for a short time.

Upgrade 1.Name: Rock Tomb
Upgrade 1.Description:
Splits open the ground toward the designated area, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and creating a barricade of rock. Activating this move again removes the barricade.

Decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time when this move hits.

The user can use this move again to destroy the wall of rock early.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Strengthens the movement speed decrease from this move to 80%.

Upgrade 2.Name: Shell Smash
Upgrade 2.Description:
Convert a set percentage of Defense and Sp. Defense into Attack and Sp. Attack and increase movement speed for a short time.

Increased conversion rate.

All modifiers (except emblem color bonuses) work with 0 base Defense and Sp. Def for the duration of this buff.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Strengthens the conversion rate from lost Defense and Sp. Def to bonus Attack and Sp. Atk to 50%.

Move 2.Name: Fury Cutter
Move 2.Description:
Slashes enemies with claws, dealing damage to them. Hitting the same enemy multiple times in succession with this move increases the damage dealt.

Additional stacking damage from this move is always rounded up.

Upgrade 1.Name: Stealth Rock
Upgrade 1.Description:
Throws many small rocks. When a rock hits an enemy or when the rocks have flown their full distance, a zone of many levitating rocks is created dealing slowly-increasing damage over time to enemies in the area of effect.

Increases the duration of this move's effects and decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time when this move hits.

Additional stacking damage from subsequent hits for each trap is always rounded up.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: The trap of levitating rocks remains for 1s longer; this move can hit up to 10 times (maximum 135% increased damage on the tenth hit). Also decreases the movement speed of opposing Pokémon hit by 35% for 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: X-Scissor
Upgrade 2.Description:
Dash forward with crossed claws, dealing damage to enemies multiple times and shoving them. Leaves enemies unable to act if they hit an object when shoved.

Reduced cooldown.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

Unite Move.Name: Rubble Rouser
Unite Move.Description:
Gain a shield for a short time and leave nearby enemies unable to act, dealing damage over time to them. If the user receives damage while this move is in effect, the move deals additional hits to nearby enemies.

The value of the shield gained from Rubble Rouser is equal to 40% max HP + 600.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 40% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Synchronize
Passive Ability.Description: Each time Mew uses a move, Mew and nearby allies have their movement speed increased by 15% for 2s.
Passive Ability.Description 2: When Mew reaches level 5, the Move Reset icon can be used to reset Mew's moves and learn new moves. This ability goes on a 25s cooldown after it's used. Each time Mew knocks out or makes an assist on an enemy player, or scores a goal, the Move Reset cooldown is reduced (Knockout: 40%, Assist: 20%, Goal: 5%). Using Move Reset adds 5000 Unite Move energy to Mystical Mirage.

Mew.Attack: Each time Mew uses a move, they gain a boost counter. A maximum of 3 boost counters can be stored. After 3 counters are stored (they have to be consumed within 8s or they disappear), Mew's next basic attack becomes a boosted attack that consumes all counters and launches a ball of psychic energy at an enemy. During the lock-on animation Mew can use moves. The further the ball travels, the more damage it deals (4% more damage per threshold, stacking additively). This ball pierces through wild Pokémon, but will stop traveling upon contact with the first enemy player.

Move 1.Name: Electro Ball
Move 1.Description:
Hurl an electric orb, dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect and leaving them paralyzed (40% slow, 10% attack speed reduction) for 2s. This move deals more damage the lower the enemies' remaining HP is.

Through Light Screen: Damage dealt and area-of-effect radius are increased.

Upgrade 1.Name: Solar Beam
Upgrade 1.Description:
Blast a bundled beam of light, dealing damage 3 times to enemies in the area-of-effect. If this move hits an enemy, Mew gains an additional boost counter.

Through Light Screen: Damage dealt and area-of-effect radius are increased.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Reduce this move's cooldown by 0.5s for each enemy hit.

Upgrade 2.Name: Surf
