Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Also applies a Gooey effect when this move hits.

Upgrade 2.Name: Acid Spray
Upgrade 2.Description: Spits acidic fluid at target Pokémon, dealing damage to Pokémon in an area of effect centered on the target slowing them by 80% for 3s, decaying by 15% every 0.5s. If this move is used again within 5s, Goodra charges in the designated direction and deals damage to opposing Pokémon hit. If this charge hits a Pokémon that has been marked by acidic fluid, that Pokémon is thrown for 0.75s, and damage is also dealt to nearby opposing Pokémon.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Also applies a Gooey effect to opposing Pokémon that receive damage from either the acidic fluid or the charge.

Unite Move.Name: Right as Rain
Unite Move.Description: Causes rain to fall around the user, gradually restoring the user’s HP over 6s. While this move is active, all of the user’s basic attacks become boosted attacks.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 40% Max HP Shield, 50% Movement Speed

Passive Ability.Name: Huge Power
Passive Ability.Description:
When this Pokémon hits only a single enemy with a basic attack, a move, or their Unite Move, the hit is always a critical hit. However, when hitting two or more enemies at once with a basic attack, a move, or its Unite Move, the hits are never critical hits.

Critical hits deal 170% rather than 200%.

Azumarill.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage to enemies within a cone area of effect in front of this Pokémon.

Move 1.Name: Tackle
Move 1.Description: Charge forward, dealing damage to any enemy hit and leave them unable to act for a short time.

Upgrade 1.Name: Play Rough
Upgrade 1.Description:
Increases movement speed for a short time and changes the next basic attack. When Azumarill performs their next basic attack, lunge at one enemy in range and deliver repeated blows; dealing damage to that target and leave it unable to act for a short time.

Further increases movement speed when this move is used, and also reduces this move’s cooldown.

Using Play Rough will overwrite any active Aqua Tail attack change. Play Rough attacks count as auto attacks for the purpose of items, lifesteal and other benefits.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Further increases movement speed to 35% when this move is used, and also reduces this move’s cooldown by 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Water Pulse
Upgrade 2.Description:
Shoot a pulsing blast of water in front of Azumarill. When the blast of water hits an enemy, decrease that Pokémon’s movement speed and deal damage to all enemies in an area of effect around the initial target hit. The blast of water then automatically bounces to another target if one is available. Including the first target, the blast of water can bounce between up to 3 targets consecutively, and each hit behaves in the same way as the first. While the blast of water is traveling, Azumarill can perform a short rolling dash in a designated direction.

Increase the maximum number of targets that the blast of water can bounce between by 2.

Move 2.Name: Bubble
Move 2.Description: Spray bubbles in a cone; dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decrease their movement speed for a short time. This move can be used while moving.

Upgrade 1.Name: Whirlpool
Upgrade 1.Description:
For a short time, four small whirlpools appear that swirl around Azumarill as they move. If a whirlpool hits an enemy, the whirlpool deals damage and restores Azumarill's HP. If a whirlpool hits an enemy player, an increased amount of HP is restored.

Reduce this move’s cooldown and increases the amount of HP it restored.

Moving clockwise against your target will grant more hits against that target, and counter-clockwise will reduce the number of hits.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Reduces this move’s cooldown by 2s and increases the amount of HP restored.

Upgrade 2.Name: Aqua Tail
Upgrade 2.Description:
Increases the speed and area of effect of Azumarill's next 3 basic attacks. If these basic attacks hit from a distance, they also deal increased damage, restore Azumarill's HP, and can ignore the Defense stat and shield effects of enemies hit.

After activating this move, Azumarill's next 3 basic attacks will also reduce the cooldown of all moves when they hit an enemy from a distance.

Aqua Tail attacks count as auto attacks for the purpose of items, lifesteal and other benefits.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Aqua Tail attacks that hit from a distance reduce the cooldown of all moves by 0.8s.

Unite Move.Name: Belly Bash
Unite Move.Description: Azumarill pounds their belly 3 times, granting a shield. With each pound, Azumarill loses HP in exchange for increased Attack. Azumarill can move while pounding their belly. Afterward, target an enemy and then charge at the target; dealing damage to them and throwing all enemies hit while charging.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 30% CDR, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Volt Absorb
Passive Ability.Description: Gain an electric charge when receiving damage, converting a portion of that damage into additional Attack.

Zeraora.Attack:
Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage and paralyzing the enemy while restoring some of Zeraora's HP.

The movement speed of paralyzed targets is decreased by 15% for 2.5s and their auto attack speed is decreased by 25% for 1s.

Move 1.Name: Agility
Move 1.Description: Perform a quick dash and increase basic attack speed for a short time afterward.

Upgrade 1.Name: Volt Switch
Upgrade 1.Description:
Perform a high-speed dash, dealing damage to enemies hit and increase basic attack speed for a short time. Using this move again within a set period of time will allow the user to immediately dash back to the original position.

Increased damage and basic attack speed buff duration.

This move can be used again within 3s to dash back to the starting location, dealing increased damage to opposing Pokémon in their path; and refreshing the auto attack speed buff duration.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the damage of both dashes. Strengthens the auto attack speed increase to 60% for 3s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Spark
Upgrade 2.Description:
Leap at an enemy dealing damage to them. If using your basic attack before reaching the targeted enemy, instead leap at the closest enemy and deal damage to it. This move can be used 3 times before going on cooldown.

Also restore HP if performing a basic attack before reaching the targeted enemy.

This move can be used again within 4s of the last use, repeating the effects of the first use (up to 3 total uses).
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Restores 15% missing HP if leaping to an opposing Pokémon with an auto attack before reaching them with the dash.

Move 2.Name: Slash
Move 2.Description: Pounce at an enemy and attack with sharp claws. This move's final attack throws enemies.

Upgrade 1.Name: Discharge
Upgrade 1.Description:
Release an electrical discharge, dealing damage to nearby enemies and grant the user a shield when it hits. If this move hits enemies that are paralyzed, it pulls them in toward the user once the move ends, dealing damage to them once again and leaving them unable to act.

Decreases movement speed of enemies for a short time when this move hits.

Pulls opposing Pokémon paralyzed by the user hit by the final discharge in toward Zeraora's position over 1s, stunning them for 1s during the pull; and dealing extra damage to them.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Decreases the movement speed of opposing Pokémon by 25% for 1s when hit.

Upgrade 2.Name: Wild Charge
Upgrade 2.Description:
Charge in the designated direction. If this move hits an enemy, unleash a combo attack that also deals a set amount of damage to itself. If the user hit an enemy with Volt Switch, Spark, or a boosted attack before using this move, the number of attacks in the combo is increased.

Also deals damage to nearby enemies when this hits.

Hitting an opposing Pokémon with boosted attacks, Volt Switch, or Spark applies 1 stack of a Wild Charge buff for 5s (up to 3 stacks); each stack of the buff adds 1 additional attack to the next use of Wild Charge (for up to 6 total hits). Zeraora is untargetable while attacking; for 1.2s at 0 stacks, 1.5s at 1 stack, 1.8s at 2 stacks and 2s at 3 stacks from this buff.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Deals 50% reduced damage to other nearby opposing Pokémon with each attack.

Unite Move.Name: Plasma Gale
Unite Move.Description:
Unleash a blast of lightning, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and throw them. This also creates a zone of plasma that increases the user's basic attack range and damage dealt while inside this zone.

Creates a circular zone of plasma centered on the target's location for 5s when it hits; paralyzing opposing Pokémon inside it for 3s. While in the zone, also increases the user's auto attack range, and auto attack damage by 20%.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 20% Attack Speed, 15% CDR, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Adaptability
Passive Ability.Description: Every time Eevee deals or receives damage, increase Sp. Attack by 5% for 1.5s, stacking up to 4 times.
Passive Ability.Description 2: Every time Sylveon deals or receives damage, increase Sp. Atk and Sp. Defense by 2.5% for 1.5s, stacking up to 6 times.

Sylveon.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

Move 1.Name: Swift
Move 1.Description: Shoots star-shaped rays at enemies, dealing damage to them.

Upgrade 1.Name: Mystical Fire
Upgrade 1.Description: Increases the number of flames by one.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the number of flames by one.

Upgrade 2.Name: Hyper Voice
Upgrade 2.Description:
Unleashes an attack of multiple sound waves that deal damage when they hit. The damage dealt increases the farther the target is from Sylveon. Every time a sound wave hits, enemy Sp. Defense is reduced by 50 and the next sound wave's damage increases.

Increases the number of sound waves by one.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Pokémon hit are slowed by 30%

Move 2.Name: Baby-Doll Eyes
Move 2.Description: Stare at an enemy with baby-doll eyes, dealing damage and decreasing their Attack and movement speed for a short time when this move hits.

Upgrade 1.Name: Draining Kiss
Upgrade 1.Description:
Blow a kiss at an enemy that goes back and forth between Sylveon and the target multiple times. When the kiss touches Sylveon, restore  HP. When it hits the enemy, deal damage and decrease their movement speed for a short time. If Sylveon and the enemy move too far away from each other, the kiss will disappear faster than normal.

Increases the amount of HP this move restores.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increased healing.

Upgrade 2.Name: Calm Mind
Upgrade 2.Description:
Sylveon quietly focuses their mind and calms their spirit, increasing movement speed, Sp. Attack by 40% and Sp. Defense by 10% for a short time.

One time only while using this move, if Sylveon is hit by an Enemy's move, the damage is completely nulliffied and Sylveon is granted a shield.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: For up to 3s after using Calm Mind+ Sylveon can block one move (auto attacks will not be blocked), negating the first instance of damage and granting a shield for 3s. Hinderances and status effects will still be applied.

Unite Move.Name: Fairy Frolic
Unite Move.Description:
Jump into the air and become briefly invincible. The moment Sylveon lands, deal damage to enemies in the area of effect and restore Sylveon's HP. For 10s afterward, 50% of damage dealt by Sylveon is converted into HP (basic attacks are excluded).

Against Wild Pokémon: Damage is capped at 2000.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 30% CDR, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Overgrow
Passive Ability.Description: When HP is low, increases all damage dealt.

Venusaur.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage. This boosted attack also pulls enemies inward between the vines.

Move 1.Name: Seed Bomb
Move 1.Description: Hurl a large seed at the designated area, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect.

Upgrade 1.Name: Sludge Bomb
Upgrade 1.Description:
Hurl unsanitary sludge to the designated area, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect, leaving them poisoned and decreasing their movement speed and Sp. Defense for a short time

Increased area of effect.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increased radius.

Upgrade 2.Name: Giga Drain
Upgrade 2.Description:
Drain HP from enemies in the area of effect, dealing damage to them and restoring HP when this hits. Also reduces damage received for a short time.

Increases amount of HP restored.

This move's healing is not increased by Venusaur's passive.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increased healing.

Move 2.Name: Razor Leaf
Move 2.Description: Launch many sharp-edged leaves in a quick succession of attacks, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect.

Upgrade 1.Name: Solar Beam
Upgrade 1.Description:
Blast a bundled beam of light, dealing damage to enemies in a line.

Reduced cooldown.

Against Wild Pokémon: Each tick is capped at 450 damage and the total damage is capped at 2250.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Reduced cast time to 0.6s and base cooldown is further reduced by 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Petal Dance
Upgrade 2.Description:
Scatter petals around the user, increasing movement speed for a short time and dealing damage over time to enemies in the area of effect.

Increased area of effect.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increased radius.

Unite Move.Name: Verdant Anger
Unite Move.Description: Launches a giant seed toward the designated area. The seed then splits apart, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 30% CDR, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Snow Warning
Passive Ability.Description: Causes snow to fall on an enemy, dealing damage to it and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for .75s. Boosted attacks, Snow Warning, and all moves (except Aurora Veil) sling snow; hitting the same target with snow 4 times will freeze them for 1s. This ability has an 8s cooldown.

Alolan Ninetales.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, it deals damage to nearby enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

Move 1.Name: Powder Snow
Move 1.Description: Attack with a chilly gust of powdery snow, decreasing the movement speed of enemies for a short time when it hits.

Upgrade 1.Name: Avalanche
Upgrade 1.Description:
Attack with a gush of chilly ice toward the designated area. The ice forms a wall that cannot be passed through on land. After a short time this wall melts and collapses, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect.

Also decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time when this move hits.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Also decreases the movement speed of enemies by 50% for 1s when this move hits.

Upgrade 2.Name: Dazzling Gleam
Upgrade 2.Description:
Attack with a powerful cone of blinding light, leaving enemies unable to act when this move hits.

Increased damage dealt and stun duration.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increased damage and stun duration to 1s.

Move 2.Name: Icy Wind
Move 2.Description: Attack with a gust of freezing air, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time when it hits.

Upgrade 1.Name: Blizzard
Upgrade 1.Description:
Summons a howling blizzard in two blasts in front of the user. The first blast deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time. The second blast deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and shoves them. If the second blast hits an obstacle, it also deals damage to enemies near the point of impact.

Increased damage.

Upgrade 2.Name: Aurora Veil
Upgrade 2.Description:
Create an aurora around the user, reducing damage received by the user and nearby allies in the area of effect. While the user is inside the aurora, its movement speed is increased and its basic attacks become boosted attacks.

Further reduces damage allies receive.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Damage reduction increased to 40% and cooldown reduced by 2s.

Unite Move.Name: Snow Globe
Unite Move.Description: Attacks with a chilly blast of snow and ice, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect when it hits. Deals increased damage to enemies that are frozen.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 30% Movement Speed, 30% CDR, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Super Luck
Passive Ability.Description: Increased Critical-Hit rate by 15%.

Absol.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to enemies and lowering their Defense by 15% for 2s when it hits. If this boosted attack hits only a single target, it deals increased damage.

Move 1.Name: Feint
Move 1.Description:
Dash in an arc, attacking enemies that come in contact with Absol. This move ignores the defense stat and shield effects of enemies.

Each use alternates between a rightward and leftward arc.

Upgrade 1.Name: Night Slash
Upgrade 1.Description:
Dash in an outward arc, dealing damage to enemies. If this first attack hits, a second attack can also be performed. The second attack has the user dash straight ahead, dealing damage to enemies and increasing the user's critical-hit rate. The lower the enemies HP, the more the user's critical-hit rate is increased.

Using this move again will restore the user's HP.

The first use is a rightward arc forward from the perspective of the orange team (right-side team, which has the map flipped horizontally when in battle).
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Restores the user's HP for 50% of damage dealt with the second dash hit.

Upgrade 2.Name: Pursuit
Upgrade 2.Description:
Dash to the designated location and quickly charge an enemy with the next basic attack. (Basic attack range is doubled while this effect is active). If the basic attack lands from behind, its damage is increased and this move's cooldown is reduced.

Increased movement speed.

When the user has an empowered attack readied, nearby non-allied Pokémon have their backs highlighted.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the user's movement speed by 35% for 2s after using this move and before using the empowered attack.

Move 2.Name: Slash
Move 2.Description:
Slash with sharp claws in front of the user, increasing this move's critical-hit rate.

This move's critical-hit rate is increased by 15%.

Upgrade 1.Name: Psycho Cut
Upgrade 1.Description:
Attack with blades formed by psychic power that decrease the movement speed of enemies for a short time when this move hits. Also increases basic attack damage dealt to the affected enemy for up to 3 attacks after this move hits.

Also increases movement speed for a short time when the user gets close to the enemy that this move hit.

The critical-hit rate of the psychic slash and consumed marks is increased by 15%. The marks can be cleansed.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the user's movement speed by 20% when an opposing Pokémon is marked by this move.

Upgrade 2.Name: Sucker Punch
Upgrade 2.Description:
Look for an opening to attack an enemy, decreasing the movement speed of the user and the target enemy for the duration. After a short time, charge forward to attack the enemy. However, if the user receives damage or gets attacked before it charges, attack immediately and shove the enemy.

Increases basic attack speed for a short time when this move hits.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Increases the user's basic attack speed by 40% for 3s after using this move.

Unite Move.Name: Midnight Slash
Unite Move.Description:
Unleashes a flurry of slashes in front of the user. This move ends by unleashing powerful blades of energy, dealing increased damage to enemies and shoves them.

The damage of the flurry of 5 slashes is divided by the number of targets hit. The first hit from the final slash deals full damage to each target hit; subsequent hits deal 30% of the full damage to the same target.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 80% Movement Speed, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Illusion
Passive Ability.Description:
The user takes the form of a random wild Pokémon or Pokémon from the opposing team. The user returns to their original form when taking damage or using an auto attack or move (15s cd).

The target of the illusion does not need to be in vision to take their form.

Zoroark.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

Move 1.Name: Slash
Move 1.Description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit.

Upgrade 1.Name: Shadow Claw
Upgrade 1.Description:
Dash in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit and leaving them unable to act for a short time. If this move hits an enemy near the end point of the dash, they will be thrown instead of being left unable to act.

Increases the length of time enemies are thrown.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Strengthens the duration of the throw at the endpoint to 0.5s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Cut
Upgrade 2.Description:
Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies, and restoring the Zoroark's HP.

Increases the amount of HP this move restores.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Strengthened amount of HP restored.

Move 2.Name: Fury Swipes
Move 2.Description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies. If this move hits an enemy, for a short time afterwards, this move can be activated again.

Upgrade 1.Name: Night Slash
Upgrade 1.Description:
For a short time, change the user’s normal movement to dash attacks. After performing a dash attack, the user’s next auto attack changes to a special auto attack. During this move’s effect duration, whenever Zoroark hits an enemy with other moves or special auto attacks, this move’s effect duration increases and the user is able to use Night Slash again. This move’s effect duration ends if the user moves when it’s unable to use Night Slash. During this move’s effect duration, if Zoroark hits enemies with a total of six moves and/or special auto attacks, Zoroark will jump into the air and then while landing, slash a set area-of-effect, dealing damage to enemies. Zoroark recovers HP if they hit enemies with this slashing attack. While jumping, the user is able to use Shadow Claw or Cut to move a set distance.

Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

If Zoroark hits opposing Pokémon with a total of 6 valid attacks: cleanses status conditions and becomes invincible for 1.4s,  jumping into the air then landing after 1.2s. When the user lands: slashes a cross-shaped area of effect, damaging opposing Pokémon with two diagonal slashes, and dealing additional missing HP damage when it hits; restores HP once for each of the two diagonal areas of the cross slash that hits an opposing Pokémon (up to 2 times if both slashes hit).  This cross-shaped attack deals move damage if triggered by a final move hit, or auto attack damage if triggered by a final unique boosted attack. While jumping, the user is able to use Slash, Shadow Claw, or Cut to move a set distance.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Feint Attack
Upgrade 2.Description:
Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies and reducing all of the user’s move cooldowns. If this move hits an enemy, for a short time, the location where the dash started is marked, and the user is able to use this move again; returning to the marked location and dealing damage to enemies. A new mark is left where the dash started. As long as there is a mark, if the user uses another move, the mark will move to where the move was used. If the user hits enemies four times with either Feint Attack or other moves without interrupting the chain of marking, the next use of Feint Attack changes. If this changed form of Feint Attack is used, Zoroark leaps at the designated enemy and deals damage to them before landing in the designated direction.

Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

If Zoroark hits opposing Pokémon 4 times with either Feint Attack or other normal moves without interrupting the chain of marking: changes the next use of Feint Attack for 3s. When used again: becomes unstoppable for 0.5s and leaps at the designated opposing Pokémon; then bounces in the designated direction forward off the target to perform a slashing attack, damaging the target and opposing Pokémon in the path, dealing additional missing HP damage to those hit.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

Unite Move.Name: Nightfall Daze
Unite Move.Description: Release dark shockwaves, dealing damage to enemies hit. Three shockwaves are released, and each one has an increasingly larger area-of-effect. Zoroark is immune to hindrances while releasing shockwaves.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 80% Movement Speed, 20% Max HP Shield

Passive Ability.Name: Technician
Passive Ability.Description: After using a move, the next basic attack will change to deal 2 attacks instead. The second attack deals reduced damage.

Scyther.Attack: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, increasing Scyther's movement speed by 40% for 3s.

Move 1.Name: Fury Cutter
Move 1.Description: Slashes twice dealing damage with its scythes in a cone. The second slash deals more damage than the first.

Upgrade 1.Name: Dual Wingbeat
Upgrade 1.Description: Slashes in front with scythes, dealing damage in an X-shaped area-of-effect. If the second slash deals damage to an enemy in the center, restore the user's HP. If this move hits an enemy, it can be activated again within a set amount of time. If this move is used again, the user dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. The dash deals more damage the lower their HP is.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Increases the damage dealt by this move.

Move 2.Name: Quick Attack
Move 2.Description: Dashes in designated direction dealing damage to enemies hit along the way.

Upgrade 1.Name: Double Hit
Upgrade 1.Description:
Jumps in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies during the jump and applying a mark to that enemy until they leave combat. After hitting an enemy, jump again. An enhanced auto attack is prepared on landing that has increased range and charges at the enemy being attacked. This enhanced attack is available for 5s.

If a marked enemy is knocked out, all of the user's move cooldowns are reset. The mark may be cleansed.
Upgrade 1.Enhanced Description: Reduces cooldown by 1s.

Upgrade 2.Name: Swords Dance
Upgrade 2.Description: Dashes a short distance, increasing Attack by 15% for 5s. While Swords Dance's attack buff is active, after basic attacks or abilities make contact 8 times, the user launches an area-of-effect attack that pierces through enemies in a line.
Upgrade 2.Enhanced Description: Reduces the damage the user receives by 50% while dashing (0.3s).

Unite Move.Name: Green Illusion Dive
Unite Move.Description: Target an enemy, slashing through them dealing an initial hit of damage and creating 5 copies a set distance away. Copies deal damage to enemies they make contact with and apply a mark to them for 5s. After 5s, the copies return to Scyther, dealing damage to enemies they make contact with and healing Scyther for each hit. This move may be used again within 5s of activating as a dash in a designated direction dealing damage to enemies hit. The copies then dash to the end location of the user's dash. If a copy makes contact with an enemy while returning to Scyther, the copy deals damage to that enemy and disappears. If a marked enemy is knocked out, all of Scyther's move cooldowns are reset. Subsequent copies hitting the same target deal 70% reduced damage.
Unite Move.Buff Stats: 80% Movement Speed, 20% Max HP Shield
